rationale: The citing paper mentions Rutz and Bucklin (2011) in the introductory literature review and in a summary table as an example of prior paid-search research on generic-to-branded spillover at a different analysis level. Its role is mainly to help position the paper's gap (the new study models buyers and sellers jointly at the platform level), not to provide a core framework that is reused. The citing paper does not meaningfully build its hypotheses, model specification, or interpretation around this specific cited study.
